operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Command Completion and Resend Mechanism
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain how to complete and resend AGV commands
operational_intents: Execute AGV command completion with full AGVID
Use resend command to retry sending callbacks after server restart
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract command execution and retry process details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on AGV command handling and retry logic

operational_scenes.scene_title: Tote and AGV Initialization and Removal Procedures
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe how to initialize and remove AGVs and totes
operational_intents: Explain workaround for hardware issues affecting tote removal
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract procedures for AGV/tote management and issue handling
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Capture operational steps for tote and AGV handling

operational_scenes.scene_title: Identifying Station IDs and Tote Status
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain how to determine station IDs and tote assignments
operational_intents: Use database or RMS to find station IDs
Interpret color coding for station status
Add missing totes to stations manually
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract methods for station and tote status identification
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify tote-station mapping and status verification

operational_scenes.scene_title: Tote Task Management and Manual Exchanges
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Manage tote tasks and perform manual tote exchanges
operational_intents: Exchange totes manually for testing or issue resolution
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract tote task management and manual exchange procedures
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on tote task control and troubleshooting
